prompt: I just finished fine-tuning Llama 3.1 8B on Nebius (job id: ftjob-xyz789). How do I deploy the latest checkpoint as a serverless LoRA endpoint and then query it?

assertions.text: Uses ftjob-xyz789:checkpoint_id format for source field
Shows how to run inference with the deployed model name
assertions.value: Includes code to call the deployed model via chat completions API
